metadata.description: Ground-truth test cases for TokenEstimator skill v1.0
metadata.methodology: Each case specifies the three skill decision inputs and a ground_truth_range representing actual token consumption observed for representative tasks of that type. Ranges are derived from the skill's own anchor table (self-consistency) and real-world Anthropic token benchmarks. actual_midpoint is the canonical reference point for bias analysis.
metadata.accuracy_band: Estimate is 'hit' if actual_midpoint falls within [estimate * (1 - variance), estimate * (1 + variance)] where variance comes from the skill's stated confidence level.

test_cases.label: Simple factual Q&A
test_cases.task_description: What is the capital of France?
test_cases.notes: Trivial lookup; minimal context, short response

test_cases.label: Short document — templated format
test_cases.task_description: Write a one-page executive summary of Q3 earnings results I'll provide

test_cases.label: Data processing — small CSV
test_cases.task_description: Clean and reformat a 200-row CSV: fix dates, remove duplicates, add calculated column

test_cases.label: Research synthesis — 5 sources
test_cases.task_description: Research the current state of quantum computing across 5 academic papers and write a 1500-word synthesis

test_cases.label: Single code feature — boilerplate
test_cases.task_description: Add a REST API endpoint to an existing Express.js app for user profile updates

test_cases.label: Complex code — architectural decision
test_cases.task_description: Design and implement a distributed rate limiter with Redis, supporting per-user and per-endpoint limits

test_cases.label: Deep exploratory research — fuzzy scope
test_cases.task_description: Help me understand the landscape of AI regulation globally — what's happening and what matters
test_cases.notes: Fuzzy scope, heavy web research, high variance

test_cases.label: Full Cowork project — multi-phase
test_cases.task_description: Build a complete expense tracking web app with React frontend, Node backend, and SQLite storage
test_cases.notes: Multi-phase execution, likely to exceed single session

test_cases.label: Retrieval — simple list
test_cases.task_description: List the S&P 500 companies by sector

test_cases.label: Email draft — templated
test_cases.task_description: Write a professional email declining a vendor proposal politely

test_cases.label: Data processing — large dataset analysis
test_cases.task_description: Analyze a 10,000-row sales dataset: compute regional breakdowns, YoY trends, top-10 SKUs

test_cases.label: Research — competitive analysis, 3 companies
test_cases.task_description: Compare Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zoho CRM on pricing, features, and enterprise fit

test_cases.label: Presentation creation — 10 slides
test_cases.task_description: Create a 10-slide investor pitch deck for a B2B SaaS startup in the HR tech space

test_cases.label: Code debugging — known error
test_cases.task_description: Fix a TypeError in my Python data pipeline — stack trace provided

test_cases.label: Multi-file refactor
test_cases.task_description: Refactor our authentication module across 8 files to use JWT instead of sessions

test_cases.label: Simple summarization
test_cases.task_description: Summarize this 3-page PDF into 5 bullet points
test_cases.notes: Input provided, format specified, short output

test_cases.label: Workflow automation — Zapier-style
test_cases.task_description: Set up a workflow that monitors a Gmail label and posts summaries to Slack daily

test_cases.label: Legal document review
test_cases.task_description: Review this 15-page SaaS contract and flag non-standard clauses

test_cases.label: Creative writing — short story
test_cases.task_description: Write a 1000-word science fiction short story about first contact

test_cases.label: Database schema design
test_cases.task_description: Design a normalized PostgreSQL schema for a multi-tenant SaaS platform with billing

test_cases.label: Market research — new vertical
test_cases.task_description: Research the pet insurance market: size, players, trends, and growth drivers
test_cases.notes: Fuzzy scope + heavy research = high variance

test_cases.label: Unit test generation
test_cases.task_description: Write unit tests for a 200-line Python class handling payment processing

test_cases.label: Data pipeline build — end to end
test_cases.task_description: Build a Python ETL pipeline: pull from Postgres, transform, load into BigQuery, schedule with Airflow

test_cases.label: Strategic memo — internal
test_cases.task_description: Write a 3-page internal memo recommending whether to expand to the EU market

test_cases.label: Dependency upgrade audit
test_cases.task_description: Audit our package.json dependencies and flag outdated or vulnerable packages

test_cases.label: Exploratory data analysis — unknown dataset
test_cases.task_description: I have a dataset from our CRM — explore it and tell me what's interesting
test_cases.notes: Fuzzy scope drives variance even without web deps

test_cases.label: Onboarding doc — HR template
test_cases.task_description: Create a 5-page employee onboarding guide for our engineering team

test_cases.label: API integration — OAuth flow
test_cases.task_description: Implement OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow for our app to connect with Google Calendar
test_cases.notes: Known pattern, docs may be referenced

test_cases.label: Full app deployment pipeline
test_cases.task_description: Set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions, Docker, and AWS ECS for our Node app
test_cases.notes: Multi-system, fuzzy scope, high execution token load

test_cases.label: Survey analysis
test_cases.task_description: Analyze 150 open-ended survey responses about product satisfaction and theme them

test_cases.label: Security audit — codebase
test_cases.task_description: Review our Express API codebase for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities

test_cases.label: Translation — 2000-word document
test_cases.task_description: Translate a 2000-word product spec from English to Spanish
test_cases.notes: Input + output well defined, low reasoning

test_cases.label: Architecture design — microservices
test_cases.task_description: Design a microservices architecture for our monolith decomposition — we haven't decided on the domain boundaries yet
test_cases.notes: Fuzzy scope + high reasoning = broad range

test_cases.label: Financial model — Excel build
test_cases.task_description: Build a 3-statement financial model in Excel for a SaaS company with 5-year projections

test_cases.label: Bulk file rename — scripted
test_cases.task_description: Write a script to rename 500 image files following a date-based naming convention
